title: Magik's Vanilla Forever
description: An agglomeration of vanilla-like mods for the MagikVanilla Forever server.
body:
### Purpose:
An agglomeration of vanilla-like mods, resource packs, and shaders built specifically for the users of the "MagikVanilla Forever" server, a multiplayer world that has been played on for 10+ years by several long-term players.

### Appeal:
The pack targets improving the basic vanilla player experience (performance, visuals, and quality of life) without affecting base game mechanics as implemented by Mojang, allowing a faithful to vanilla playstyle while taking advantage of the modding community's contributions.

### Content:
<details>
<summary>Mods:</summary>
  
Name                                | Version
---                                 | ---
3D Skin Layers                      | 1.9.0
Collective                          | 1.21.8-8.4-fabric+forge+neo
Distant Horizons                    | 2.3.4-b-1.21.8
Dynamic FPS                         | 3.9.6
[EMF] Entity Model Features         | 3.0.1
[ETF] Entity Texture Features       | 7.0.2
Fabric API                          | 0.133.4+1.21.8
FerriteCore                         | 8.0.0-fabric
Iris Shaders                        | 1.9.1+1.21.7-fabric
Litematica                          | 0.23.4
Litematica Printer                  | 3.2.1-sakura.8+1.21.8
Lithium                             | mc1.21.8-0.18.0-fabric
MaLiLib                             | 0.25.5
Mod Menu                            | 15.0.0
Quick Right-Click                   | 1.21.8-1.7-fabric+forge+neo
Shulker Box Tooltip                 | 5.2.8+1.21.7-fabric
Sodium                              | mc1.21.6-0.6.13-fabric
YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)          | 3.7.1+1.21.6-fabric
</details>

<details>
<summary>Resource Packs:</summary>
  
Name                                | Version
---                                 | ---
3D Default                          | 1.12.1
Dramatic Skys                       | 1.5.3.35
Even Better Enchants                | 2-1.21.5
Fresh Animations                    | 1.10.1
Fresh Animations: Extensions        | 1.6
</details>

<details>
<summary>Shader Packs:</summary>
  
Name                                | Version
---                                 | ---
Complementary Shaders - Reimagined  | r5.3
</details>

Pack additionally comes bundled with pre-configured settings for all the aformentioned dependencies.
